headlines.title: Trump says he won't 'rush into' deal to end war with Iran
headlines.description: President Trump said Sunday that he will not “rush into a deal” to end the ongoing U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.” It comes a day after the president said that a potential deal was “largely negotiated.” NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports.

headlines.title: State of emergency declared over southern California chemical incident
headlines.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom (D-CA) declared a state of emergency in California on Saturday as thousands of people were forced to evacuate their homes over a toxic chemical tank that, authorities say, will either leak or explode. NBC News' Steve Patterson is on the ground just outside the evacuation zone.

headlines.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said he won’t “rush into a deal” to end the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.”

headlines.title: Massie says he’ll ‘stay engaged’ after primary loss, won’t rule out 2028 run
headlines.description: Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) tells Meet the Press he “won't rule anything out” as he’s asked about his political future after losing his primary to a Trump-backed challenger.

headlines.title: Secret Service kills man who opened fire at White House security checkpoint
headlines.description: The U.S. Secret Service says officers shot and killed a person who opened fire at a security checkpoint on Saturday. Five senior law enforcement officials say the suspect had a history of mental health concerns. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports.

headlines.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI

headlines.title: The 93+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping
headlines.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Kimi Antonelli wins fourth Formula 1 race in a row after George Russell’s car breaks down
headlines.description: Buckle up: The Mercedes intra-team battle for the Formula 1 drivers’ world championship just kicked into high gear

headlines.title: ‘Can’t believe I’m sitting here’: Paraglider escapes death after plane rips through glider
headlines.description: A woman paragliding over the Austrian Alps survived a horrifying midair collision after a small plane flew through her glider, sending her spiraling out of control thousands of feet in the air

headlines.title: María Corina Machado vows another run for Venezuelan presidency and eyes return from exile
headlines.description: Venezuelan Nobel Peace Prize laureate María Corina Machado announced she plans to run for president again and intends to return to her home country before the end of 2026.
